# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [ master ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ master ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Cache dependencies and outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            node_modules
            ~/.cache

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build project
        run: npm run build

      - name: Test project
        run: npm test
